summary: Good-quality audience recording of an overlooked In‑the‑Dark era show with a solid setlist that fans rank among their favorites.
review: Both reviewers give the tape four stars, noting that the sound quality is respectable for an audience (AUD) source and that the performance stands out as an underrated gem from the In‑the‑Dark period. One fan even calls it one of the top five shows in his rotation, highlighting the overall strength of the setlist despite the lack of specific song mentions.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews emphasize a good audience recording and an enjoyable, underrated performance, yielding a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound quality described as good for an AUD source; no major issues or flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overlooked In‑the‑Dark era show with a strong setlist that listeners consider a highlight of the period.
